title: vulpia bromoides subsp. sciuroides
intro: Vulpia bromoides subsp. sciuroides, also known as False Brome or False Brome Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Vulpia bromoides subsp. sciuroides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. In herbal preparations, it is often combined with other herbs to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that promote overall well-being and immune system function.
